text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash makes her mark at the Keisei Hai.
After the race, we hold a quick press meeting.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Let me start by congratulating you on a race well
run. Could you tell us how you feel about the
race?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This was good preparation for my next race, and
though there are still aspects I need to improve
upon, I have no concerns about it.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
That's wonderful to hear. If I may ask, what
exactly is the next race you have in mind?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The Satsuki Sho, of course. It will mark the
beginning of my Classic Triple Crown quest.

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Oooh! I thought that might be it. You'll be facing
some stiff competition this year, though.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
You looked great out there today, and I wish you
the best of luck, but...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I'm not the main focus... correct?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure you're already aware, but there are a lot
of big-name racers who have their eyes on the
Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I am aware, yes.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
What would you say your odds of winning are
right now? The path to victory is looking rather
difficult this time around.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: There are no odds.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I acknowledge the challenges that lie in my path,
and I have prepared accordingly for them.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Therefore, odds are a non-factor. I must simply
do what must be done...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: And the results will follow. That is all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash doesn't so much as flinch as she
makes her declaration. No other reporter dares
ask her a similar question.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The press conference ended fifteen minutes
earlier than scheduled...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I should have adopted a warmer
demeanor.
choice_data_list: It was very cool how resolute you were.
It was very cool how resolute you were.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...I'm glad you thought so.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This press conference made something very clear.
Though I have garnered a certain level of respect,
the general consensus is that I am not good
enough to compete for the Triple Crown.
choice_data_list:
You'll just have to prove them wrong at the
Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, I feel the same. It won't be long until then.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Not only will it be on the same track as today, it's
even the same length. I have already committed
the run to memory.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: This will be no problem. Let's proceed as planned.
